notes: Computed by scripts/export_meadowlane_capture_from_xlsx.ps1 from row-level student data.
2041: K-2 attending / K-2 zoned to 2041 (ELEM_MSID). PK excluded from K-2 bucket.
2031: grades 3-6 attending 2031 / grades 3-6 with ELEM_MSID 2041. Denominator does not use 2031.
Source: SY2025-26 student workbook (local path not stored in repo). Rows scanned: 74266 ; grade column: 2.

2041.description: K-2 attending Meadowlane Primary / K-2 zoned to Meadowlane Primary (2041).

2031.description: Grades 3-6 attending Meadowlane Intermediate / grades 3-6 zoned to Meadowlane Primary (2041).

zoning_audit.comment: Counts all data rows where ELEM (col V), MID (W), or HIGH (Y) parses to MSID 2031. Expect 0.
